positive: Minimalist vector graphic illustration of a serene, floating constellation over a stylized geometric mountain range. The color palette should be deep midnight blue, cosmic violet, and luminous gold accents. Include abstract celestial bodies like crescent moons and nebulae, rendered in clean, thick lines and contrasting negative space. The style must be modern, graphic, and highly scalable, resembling screen-printed textile art. Central, symmetric composition with a strong, elegant silhouette suitable for placement on a t-shirt. Crisp lines, perfect print resolution, vector art quality.
negative: blurry, low quality, artifacts, noisy, text, logo, signature, watermarks, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, abstract photo, realistic, photorealistic, clutter, messy
